subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond letters and words, befitteth and beseemeth the Sovereign of Truth, Who is a Manifestation among the Manifestations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از حروف و الفاظ سلطان حقیقت را لایق و سزاست که ظهوری از ظهورات
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @chastisement and requital, @transcendence; unknowability of God
